description: You are a construction superintendent reassigned to the 'Summit Crossing' project. Reconfigure the jobsite Chrome browser according to company IT policy and the requirements in ~/Desktop/project_browser_spec.txt. The browser must be configured with bookmarks organized into three top-level folders: 'Summit Crossing Project' (containing subfolders for Codes & Standards, Safety & Compliance, Project Management, Materials & Suppliers, Weather & Conditions, and Equipment & Rentals), 'Archived - Riverside Commons' (containing all [RC] tagged bookmarks), and 'Personal' (containing all personal bookmarks). Additionally, configure custom search shortcuts for 'icc' (https://codes.iccsafe.org/search?q=%s), 'osha' (https://www.osha.gov/search?q=%s), and 'msds' (https://www.msds.com/?q=%s). Set the homepage to https://app.procore.com and the startup pages to procore.com and weather.gov. The download directory must be set to /home/ga/Documents/Summit_Crossing/Downloads with the 'ask where to save each file before downloading' setting enabled. Privacy and security configurations must block third-party cookies and disable both password saving and address autofill. Site permissions must allow notifications for procore.com and smartsheet.com.
